slide1.title: Discover What Matters
slide1.description: Find the best places around you — from cafés to hidden gems — all in one app.

slide2.title: Explore Nearby Spots
slide2.description: Swipe through curated places and discover something new every day.

slide3.title: Save and Share Favorites
slide3.description: Keep places you love and share them quickly with your friends.

categories.title: Let's select your interests
categories.subtitle: Please select three or more to proceed

auth.title: Get Started now!
auth.description: Create an account or log in to explore about our app
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email to reset password
auth.newPasswordDescription: Enter a new password for your account
auth.enterOtpDescription: Please enter the 6-digit OTP sent to your email
auth.verificationEmail: We’ve sent you a verification link. Please open your email to confirm your account
auth.otpSent: OTP has been sent to your email
auth.resendSuccess: Verification email has been resent. Please check your email inbox
auth.usernameChangedReloginNotice: Profile updated successfully. Your username was changed, so please log in again.

errors.usernameInvalid: Username can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, dots, and underscores
errors.usernameMax: Username must be 20 characters or fewer
errors.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordComplex: Password must include at least one uppercase letter, one number and one special character.
errors.invalidCredentials: Your identifier or password was incorrect
errors.emailNotVerified: Your email is not verified yet. We've sent a new verification link to your inbox.
errors.resendTooManyRequests: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds before resending verification email
errors.otpTooManyRequests: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds before requesting a new OTP
errors.tooManyRequests: You have made too many attempts. Please try again later
errors.resetTokenMissing: Reset session is missing. Please request OTP again
errors.resetTokenExpired: Reset session expired. Please request OTP again
errors.loadCategories: Unable to load categories. Please try again later
errors.dateOfBirthFormat: Date of birth must be in DD/MM/YYYY format
errors.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Please choose a smaller image
errors.invalidImageFormat: Only JPG, JPEG, PNG, and WEBP files are supported
errors.unableToUpdateProfile: Unable to update profile. Please try again
errors.SESSION_NOT_FOUND: Group session not found. Please check the share code and try again
errors.SESSION_NOT_ACTIVE: Group session is not active. Please check the share code and try again

home.subNoPlaces: It seems like there are no places. Please try again!
home.groupSessionNotFoundDesc: Create or join a group session first.
home.groupAlreadyFinalizedDesc: You already finalized, so you cannot add more places.
home.memberVoteFinalizedDesc: You already finalized your vote, so you cannot add new places.
home.addToGroupFailedDesc: Failed to vote this place to group. Please try again.

library.title: My Library
library.noFavoritesDescription: Tap the heart icon on Home to save your favorite places.

search.title: Search
search.searchAlert: You have 5 free AI search attempts per day. Try it now!
search.aiQuotaExceededDesc: You have used all AI search attempts for today. Please upgrade your plan or come back tomorrow!
search.noResultsDesc:
We couldn’t find what you’re looking for
Maybe try a different keyword 
or check your filters?
search.locationRequiredDesc: Location is required to search for nearby places. Please enable location services and try again.

group.title: Friend Groups
group.subtitle: Decide together where to go
group.noGroupsDesc: Create your first group to start connecting and sharing!
group.joinByCodeOr: Or enter a group share code
group.joinFailed: Unable to join group. Please try again.
group.selectRadiusSubtitle: Determine the range around the midpoint to find ideal places
group.submitConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to finalize your vote?
group.noPlacesYet: No places in this group yet
group.noPlacesDesc: Add places from search to start voting together.
group.noMembersDesc: Invite more friends to start seeing recommended places.
group.shareCodeDesc: Send this code to your friends so they can join the group
group.closeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to close session {{shareCode}}?
group.leaveConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to leave session {{shareCode}}?
group.createBlockedTitle: One active group at a time
group.createBlockedMessage: You can only create one group at the same time. If you want to create another group, please close the current active group first.
group.joinBlockedMessage: To join a new session, please close your current active session first.
group.finalizeWarningMissingVotesMessage: Not all members have voted yet. Are you sure you want to finalize for the whole group?
group.finalizeWarningUnfinalizedMembersMessage: Some members have not finalized yet. Are you sure you want to finalize for the whole group?
group.finalizeCreatorOnlyTitle: Only the group creator can finalize
group.finalizeCreatorOnlyMessage: You don't have permission to finalize this group's result.
group.needActiveMembersDesc: At least 2 members need to enable GPS for recommendations. Make sure all members have location enabled!

notification.groupInviteBody: {{name}} invited you to join a group session. Use code: {{shareCode}}
notification.groupVoteReminderBody: {{voterName}} voted for {{placeName}}. Open the group to see the update.
notification.memberVoteFinalizedBody: {{name}} finalized their vote. Check the results!
notification.sessionVoteFinalizedBody: All members have finalized their votes. Check the results!
notification.groupVoteFinalizedBody: The group vote has been finalized! See the winning place.
notification.groupVoteFinalizedByHostBody: The session host has finalized the vote. Check out the results!
notification.groupVoteFinalizedByAllMembersBody: All members have voted. Check out the results!
notification.sessionClosedBody: The group session has been closed.
notification.candidateRemovedBody: {{placeName}} has been removed from voting pool.
notification.nearbyPlaceBody: Check out {{placeName}} and more places nearby!
notification.recommendationBody: We think you'll love {{placeName}}! Tap to explore.

settings.title: Settings
settings.shareLocationDesc: Allow friends to see your location in group mode

profileVisibility.title: Profile visibility
profileVisibility.description: Control who can see your profile and activity

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.groupInviteDesc: Get notified when friends invite you to group sessions
notifications.votingResultsDesc: Get notified about group voting outcomes

friends.title: Friends
friends.noFriendsDesc: Search and add friends to share your favorite places together!
friends.removeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this person from your friends list?
